news.paragraph: CrowdStrike was recently named Frost & Sullivan’s Company of the Year for its identity threat detection and response capabilities. While broader AI demand remains strong, traders should weigh this recognition against general market concerns regarding overextended AI rallies and recent volatility in the cloud security sector. There are no specific imminent catalysts like earnings or regulatory actions mentioned in the recent headlines.
headlines: AI Rally May Have Gone Too Far With Some Stocks Up 70% in a Month
